name: insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month, inefficient data extraction causes late claim resolutions. We automate data extraction instead of manual data entry into claims forms.
problem_solved: Inefficient data extraction from claims documents

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual data entry into claims forms
